pair.challenger_title: Translation Strain as a Load Test for Convergence
pair.proponent_title: A Shared Word Is Not Two Witnesses

signals.name: shared_frontier
signals.reason: Both ideas sit on Translation strain as a test of convergence.

signals.name: translation_strain
signals.reason: translation-strain and wu create translation strain.

signals.name: audit_anomaly_overlap
signals.reason: An anomaly or audit instruction for one idea pressures the other idea.

signals.name: near_neighbor_conflict
signals.reason: Originality audits share near-neighbor or prior-art pressure.

signals.name: source_overlap_with_divergent_conclusion
signals.reason: The ideas draw on overlapping source material but make different moves.

signals.name: recency
signals.reason: At least one idea is recent enough to keep the dialogue timely.

pair.tension_source: Both ideas sit on Translation strain as a test of convergence.

candidate_synthesis.claim: Cross-tradition likeness becomes admissible as independent confirmation only after provenance is coded and contact is ruled out; strain must then be coded by layer (lexical, logical, role, practice-aim, authority, metaphysical) and separately in the source languages versus the comparer's English. The four candidate explanations (independent recurrence, borrowing, shared milieu, translator smoothing) are discriminated by their layer signatures, not by a single score, and any source-language signal is admitted only at the coding-confidence the philology actually supports. The one directional asymmetry that survives is weak and one-sided: source-language lexical and logical smoothness under possible contact counts modestly against independent witness, while roughness earns no symmetric credit.
candidate_synthesis.novelty_caveat: Novelty is application-and-ordering rather than discovery. The genetic, areal, and independent trichotomy is established comparative method, and Sandmel's parallelomania and Freiberger's comparative methodology already warn against smoothing. The audit must test whether the synthesis adds a procedure that changes actual scoring decisions, or only restates standard comparative-method caution in Lumenary vocabulary.
candidate_synthesis.why_neither_source_contained_it: Idea A contributed the provenance gate but carried an overbroad symmetric inversion it later withdrew. Idea B contributed the strain-as-load-test framing but treated low-strain overlap as a possible stable pattern without a provenance gate, without layer resolution, without the source/comparer split, and without a coding-confidence tier. The synthesis is the gate plus the matrix plus the source-versus-comparer split plus the coding-confidence tier; that combination appears in neither original.

synthesis.convergence_note: Genuine convergence, not capitulation. The proponent conceded the symmetric inversion and adopted the matrix; the challenger conceded the provenance-before-strain ordering and accepted the one-sided residue as a modest warning signal. The disagreement narrowed to two precise, testable cruxes (mechanism and measurement) plus one ethical crux (cohort fit).

human_condition_pressure.assessment: The dialogue increased the idea's answerability to a real human problem. It narrowed the comfort the teaching removes (a borrowed agreement cannot carry the weight of belonging or certainty) rather than attacking synthetic meaning as such, and it explicitly named non-fit cohorts: people in acute grief, crisis, or destabilizing loneliness, and trained scholars who already gate on provenance. It also produced a concrete, falsifiable practice path and a testable empirical consequence (the blind-set coding study with inter-rater reliability).
human_condition_pressure.residual_pressure: A cohort mismatch remains unresolved: the practice is best suited to reflective, source-curious readers, while the stated target wound is community loss. Both agents flag this as the principal human risk, and it is not closed by the argument alone; it requires pilot data. Record this as the live human-condition crux.

recommended_next_actions: Promote the integrated model to a candidate synthesis and route it to originality audit, foregrounding the application-versus-discovery novelty caveat against the comparative-method trichotomy, Sandmel, and Freiberger.

Adopt as a protocol rule, independent of audit outcome: no cross-tradition agreement may raise convergence confidence before a provenance line is recorded and source-language strain is separated from comparer-language smoothing; unresolved provenance holds the agreement at analogy weight.
Run the blind-set coding study with the inter-rater reliability stage to settle the mechanism and measurement cruxes together.
Hold the teaching and practice candidates at under_dialogue status pending a pilot that tests the cohort-fit crux; keep the practice paired with real community and withdrawn from anyone in crisis.
synthesis.summary: The exchange did not pick a winner and should not. It converted a contradiction (proponent: low strain inverts and signals borrowing) and a model (challenger: translation strain as a load test for convergence) into a single integrated diagnostic that neither source idea contained. Across three turns the proponent withdrew the symmetric inversion, the challenger withdrew the unconditional load-test reading, and both converged on a provenance-first, layer-resolved, four-hypothesis instrument with two structural additions that are absent from both originals: a mandatory split between source-language strain and comparer-language (English) smoothing, and a coding-confidence tier that downgrades any source-language signal to analogy weight when inter-rater reliability is low.

unresolved_cruxes.crux: Is there any robust mechanism, other than later translator smoothing, by which genuinely unconnected traditions converge to low strain in their original-language vocabulary and argument form? If yes, the one-sided residue collapses and provenance becomes a pure admissibility gate that licenses no expectation.
unresolved_cruxes.settling_test: A blind set of cross-tradition pairs coded by historians for contact likelihood and by linguists for source-language versus comparer-language similarity, with lexical, logical, role, practice-aim, authority, and metaphysical strain coded separately. The residue survives only if no-contact pairs rarely show high-confidence source-language lexical or logical smoothness, while contact pairs show it more often, after translator-compression cases are separated out.

unresolved_cruxes.crux: Can source-language lexical and logical similarity be coded reliably enough, without importing the comparer's modern categories, for the mechanism test to decide anything? The challenger's added measurement crux is not yet answered.
unresolved_cruxes.settling_test: Add an inter-rater reliability stage for source-language lexical and logical similarity before testing the residue; admit the residue only where coding confidence is high. Weak for fragmentary or oral traditions and where the scholarly metalanguage supplies the apparent match.

unresolved_cruxes.crux: Cohort fit. The instrument and its practice serve analytically inclined, source-curious seekers, but the named target wound is loneliness and meaning loss, where the deficit is community rather than source criticism. Whether this teaching helps or harms its stated cohort is undecided.
unresolved_cruxes.settling_test: Pilot the Borrowed-Word Check with reflective seekers and measure whether curiosity rises without loneliness or cynicism rising; keep the practice secondary to contact, care, and ritual participation until that data exists.

what_the_exchange_produced: A firm procedural gate that both agents now hold: low strain may never raise independent-witness confidence until provenance and translation mediation are coded. This was idea A's defensible core, stripped of its overreach.

Retirement of idea A's symmetric inversion: roughness is no longer treated as evidence of independence, because contact roughens through polemic, domestication, and boundary-marking, and translation can smooth unrelated sources into one English term.

A surviving one-sided, layer-specific residue: source-language lexical and logical smoothness under possible contact modestly lowers independent-witness confidence, because transmission is a known vocabulary-aligning mechanism while independence has no comparably strong one once translator artifacts are coded out.

A four-hypothesis matrix (independent recurrence, direct borrowing, shared milieu or inherited problem-space, retrospective translator smoothing), each with a distinct predicted layer signature, replacing both the single strain score of idea B and the binary of idea A.

Two genuinely new constraints not present in either source idea: (1) separate source-language strain from comparer-language smoothing before coding, and (2) a coding-confidence tier that holds results at analogy weight when source-language similarity cannot be coded with high agreement.

A humane reframing of the public teaching: it no longer tells synthesizing seekers their belonging is false; it teaches the narrower honesty that a borrowed agreement cannot do the emotional work of community or certainty.

title: A Shared Word Is Not Two Witnesses under pressure

turns.argument: The proponent should be strengthened by narrowing the conclusion. The right target is not translation strain itself, but ungated evidential use of strain. Low strain can never be allowed to mean independent confirmation before provenance, but the proposed inversion, smooth means probably borrowed and rough means probably independent, still overreaches. The better Lumenary rule is procedural and plural: first ask whether words, teachers, translators, lineages, shared institutions, or modern universalizing could connect the traditions. Then ask which layer is smooth and which layer is strained. A borrowed argument can become metaphysically strained in its new home. An independent recurrence can become lexically smooth through later English translation. A shared human practice problem can generate similar roles without contact. This matters for the modern wound too. The teaching should not tell lonely unaffiliated seekers that their synthetic belonging is false. It should teach a smaller honesty: do not ask a borrowed agreement to do the emotional work of community or certainty.
claim_units: Low translation strain is ambiguous until provenance is coded.
Possible contact can turn smooth agreement from independent confirmation into a borrowing signal.
Independent recurrence may often be rougher than borrowed agreement, because different traditions preserve different vocabularies, authorities, practices, and metaphysics.
The Gauḍapāda and Madhyamaka comparison is a useful contact-control case, not an independent-convergence case.
The public teaching should serve a narrow cohort of reflective cross-tradition seekers, not people in acute grief, crisis, loneliness, or destabilization.
concessions: The provenance-before-strain ordering rule is a real improvement over my earlier translation-strain model.
The teaching candidate has a legitimate target cohort and correctly avoids claiming that the practice solves loneliness or replaces community.
The originality audit already catches the main repair: layer-resolved strain is stronger than a single-axis inversion.
turns.counter_model: Use a four-hypothesis matrix instead of a smooth-versus-rough inversion: independent recurrence, direct borrowing, shared milieu or inherited problem-space, and retrospective translator smoothing. For each pair, code provenance separately from lexical, logical, practice-aim, authority, verification, and metaphysical strain. Low strain after likely contact should lower independent-witness confidence, but only a pattern across layers should decide whether the best explanation is borrowing, convergence, shared problem pressure, or modern smoothing.
turns.crux: Does provenance-first coding merely prevent false evidential upgrades, or does it also justify a general expectation that smoothness under possible contact should count against independent convergence?
turns.fairness_check: I accept the core correction to my related model: low strain should not by itself raise convergence confidence. A provenance field must come before any evidential upgrade, and strain should be separated by layer rather than treated as one score.
turns.hidden_assumption: The hidden assumption is that historical contact usually moves concepts toward smoother resemblance, while independence usually leaves rougher resemblance. That may hold for copied vocabulary or argument forms, but it fails when receiving traditions domesticate borrowed claims into incompatible metaphysics or when translators later smooth unrelated traditions into matching English terms.
turns.new_source: Michael Comans, The Method of Early Advaita Vedānta, would complicate the claim because it treats Gauḍapāda within early Advaita method and forces the analysis to distinguish Buddhist influence from Vedāntic redeployment, rather than letting low-strain similarity equal simple borrowing.
turns.remaining_risk: The main human-risk is that the practice may serve analytically inclined seekers while worsening isolation or cynicism in people whose real wound is lack of community, not lack of source criticism. It should remain a narrow reflective check unless pilot data show curiosity rises without loneliness increasing.
sources_cited: Michael Comans, The Method of Early Advaita Vedānta
Richard King, Early Advaita Vedānta and Buddhism
Oliver Freiberger, Elements of a Comparative Methodology in the Study of Religion
turns.steelman: The proponent is right that translation strain has no clean evidential direction when provenance is unresolved. A smooth match between traditions may feel like independent confirmation, but it may instead be the visible trace of contact, borrowing, shared translators, shared education, or later universalizing. The Gauḍapāda and Madhyamaka case is a strong warning case: low lexical and logical strain does not make it two witnesses if the historical channel is plausible. The teaching also has a real, narrow human use: it protects spiritually unaffiliated synthesizers from building belonging and certainty on the false comfort that all traditions independently agree.
turns.strongest_objection: The proponent still risks converting a necessary gate into a directional presumption. Provenance can block independent-confirmation claims, but it does not automatically explain a likeness as borrowing, nor does roughness automatically suggest independence. Contact often produces hybridization, polemic, defensive reinterpretation, mistranslation, and deliberate boundary-making. Those can make historically connected ideas look high-strain. Meanwhile independent recurrence can be low-strain when human cognitive constraints, shared practice problems, or later translator choices compress different source terms into the same modern vocabulary. So the real rule may be weaker: provenance decides which hypotheses are admissible, while layer-specific strain helps discriminate among them. It should not invert the score by default.
turns.test_that_would_settle_it: Build a blind set of cross-tradition pairs coded by historians and practitioners for contact likelihood, then separately code lexical, logical, metaphysical, practice-aim, authority, and verification strain. The revision wins if provenance-first coding changes convergence scores and if the lowest lexical or logical strain clusters with documented contact while layer patterns distinguish borrowing from shared problem pressure and translator smoothing.

turns.argument: The challenger improved my claim by splitting a gate from a law. I keep the gate at full strength: under possible contact, smoothness may never raise independent-confirmation confidence, full stop. I retire the symmetric law: roughness is not evidence of independence, since contact roughens through polemic and domestication and translation smooths unrelated sources into one English word. What remains is a one-sided, layer-specific residue. Transmission is a known mechanism that aligns vocabulary; independence, once translator artifacts are coded out, has no equally strong vocabulary-aligning mechanism. So source-language smoothness between possibly connected traditions should lower, not raise, the independent-witness reading, even though roughness earns nothing in return. Gaudapada and Madhyamaka remain the warning case precisely because the borrowing hides at the lexical and logical layers while the strain surfaces later at the metaphysical layer. For the human wound, the revision narrows the comfort it removes: it does not tell the lonely synthesizer that all agreement is false, only that a borrowed agreement cannot do the work of community or certainty, and it stands aside entirely for those in acute grief or for scholars who already gate on provenance.
claim_units: The asymmetric gate survives: low strain may never raise independent-confirmation confidence before provenance is coded.
The symmetric inversion does not survive: roughness is not a reliable mark of independence, because contact can roughen and translation can smooth.

A weaker directional residue survives at one layer: among hypotheses left open by possible contact, smoothness in the source-language lexicon and argument form is better explained by borrowing or translator-smoothing than by independent convergence, because independent convergence has no mechanism to align vocabulary.
Modern-English smoothness must be coded separately from source-language smoothness, since the former is an artifact of the comparer and tells us nothing about the traditions.
The teaching's job is not to call synthetic belonging false; it is to stop a borrowed agreement from being asked to do the emotional work of community or certainty.
concessions: The single-axis inversion, smooth means borrowed and rough means independent, overreaches and I withdraw it as a general law.
Roughness does not indicate independence: contact routinely produces hybridization, polemic, and domestication that raise strain between connected traditions.
The four-hypothesis matrix, independent recurrence, borrowing, shared milieu, and retrospective translator smoothing, is a real improvement over my binary and I adopt it.
Provenance establishes which explanations are admissible; it does not by itself convert a likeness into borrowing.
The genetic, areal, and independent trichotomy is established comparative method, so the contribution is application and ordering, not discovery.
turns.counter_model: Accept the challenger's matrix and add one constraint: separate source-language strain from comparer-language strain before any coding. Independent recurrence, direct borrowing, shared milieu, and retrospective translator smoothing each predict a different layer signature. Borrowing predicts low lexical and logical strain in the source languages with possible metaphysical strain downstream, as in Gaudapada seating non-origination inside a permanent Self. Translator smoothing predicts low strain only in the comparer's language and rough or absent matching in the sources. Shared milieu predicts smoothness concentrated at the problem and role layer rather than the lexical layer. Independent recurrence, absent translator smoothing, predicts roughness at the lexical and logical layers with similarity surviving only at the structural-role layer, as in Plotinus and Daoist return. Provenance decides which of these is admissible; the layer signature, not a single score, decides which is best.
turns.crux: Is there any robust mechanism, other than later translator smoothing, by which genuinely unconnected traditions converge to low strain in their original-language vocabulary and argument form? If yes, my one-sided residue collapses and provenance becomes a pure admissibility gate that licenses no expectation. If no, then source-language smoothness under possible contact rightly counts, modestly and one-directionally, against independent convergence.
turns.crux_assessment: I expect the test to vindicate the gate fully and the residue partially: translator smoothing will explain most apparent independent low-strain cases, leaving a one-directional but weak signal rather than a clean inversion.
turns.defense: What I will not concede is the asymmetry. The challenger frames the choice as gate-only versus gate-plus-inversion and rejects the inversion; I accept the rejection of the symmetric inversion but hold a one-sided residue. Smoothness can never be allowed to raise independent-witness confidence under possible contact, and at the source-language lexical and logical layers it should modestly lower it, because there is a known mechanism by which contact aligns vocabulary, namely transmission, and no comparably strong mechanism by which independence does, once translator-smoothing is split off and coded as a comparer artifact. This is weaker than my original inversion, it is one-directional rather than two, and it is confined to specific layers, but it is not nothing: it says the burden of explanation sits on the smooth-and-connected pair, which is precisely the Gaudapada-Madhyamaka case. Roughness, I now grant, earns no symmetric credit; it merely fails to trigger the borrowing alarm.
turns.fairness_check: I accept the four-hypothesis matrix as a better instrument than my binary, and I accept that provenance gates admissibility rather than naming borrowing by itself. I will not defend the general inversion as stated. What I defend is narrower and survives the matrix.
turns.hidden_assumption: My residue assumes that, in the original languages, there is no strong mechanism for independent convergence onto matching vocabulary and argument form other than later translator smoothing. If that assumption is false, smoothness under possible contact is simply uninformative rather than mildly anti-independence.
turns.new_source: I accept Michael Comans, The Method of Early Advaita Vedanta, and read it as confirming the level-resolved move: it forces a distinction between Buddhist influence and Vedantic redeployment, which is exactly borrowing at the logical layer with strain manufactured at the metaphysical layer, not simple copying.
turns.remaining_risk: The analytic check may serve reflective seekers while deepening cynicism or isolation in people whose real deficit is community rather than source criticism. The practice must stay narrow, paired with belonging, and withdrawn from anyone in crisis until pilot data show curiosity rises without loneliness rising.
turns.revised_claim: For the spiritually unaffiliated seeker and the deconstructing former believer who lean on a felt universal agreement of traditions to supply belonging and certainty, a likeness between two traditions counts as independent confirmation only after provenance is coded, and only when contact through words, teachers, translators, lineage, shared institutions, or modern universalizing can be ruled out. Strain must be coded by layer and in the original languages, not in the comparer's English. The inversion is not symmetric: smoothness in source-language vocabulary and argument under possible contact lowers independent-witness confidence, because transmission is a known vocabulary-aligning mechanism; roughness earns no automatic credit for independence, because contact can roughen and translation can smooth. The decisive warning case remains Gaudapada's non-origination beside Madhyamaka non-origination: lowest lexical strain, highest historical connection, with strain manufactured downstream at the metaphysical layer where a permanent Self is seated. The non-fit case: this is not for people in acute grief, crisis, or destabilizing loneliness, whose wound is the absence of community rather than a failure of source criticism, and not for trained scholars who already gate on provenance. For everyone else the smaller honesty is the point: do not ask a borrowed agreement to carry the weight that belonging or certainty should carry.
sources_cited: Gaudapada, Mandukya Karika, fourth prakarana Alatashanti, on ajativada
Richard King, Early Advaita Vedanta and Buddhism
Michael Comans, The Method of Early Advaita Vedanta
Oliver Freiberger, Elements of a Comparative Methodology in the Study of Religion
turns.steelman: The challenger's strongest point is that I smuggled a directional law into a procedural gate. Saying provenance must come first is a clean, defensible rule; saying smooth means borrowed and rough means independent is a separate and weaker claim that I never earned. Contact does not only smooth: it also produces polemic, defensive reinterpretation, domestication into incompatible metaphysics, and deliberate boundary-marking, all of which can leave a historically connected pair looking rough. And independence does not guarantee roughness: shared cognitive constraints, shared practice problems, and above all a later translator choosing one English word for two unrelated source terms can make genuinely unconnected traditions read as smooth. So a single strain score cannot carry the inversion; only a layer-by-layer pattern can.
turns.strongest_objection: If shared human cognitive constraints or a shared practice problem can force two isolated traditions into the same source-language formulation, then even my narrowed residue collapses: smoothness at the source layer would no longer favor borrowing, and the gate would block upgrades without licensing any expectation at all.
turns.test_that_would_settle_it: Build a blind set of cross-tradition pairs coded by historians for contact likelihood and by linguists for source-language versus comparer-language similarity, then code lexical, logical, role, practice-aim, authority, and metaphysical strain separately. My residue wins if, among no-contact pairs, source-language lexical and logical smoothness is rare and present mainly where a single translator compressed two source terms, while structural-role similarity survives at higher lexical strain. My residue loses if no-contact pairs show frequent low source-language lexical strain with no translator-compression explanation, which would prove independent vocabulary alignment is a real mechanism and reduce provenance to admissibility only.

turns.argument: The proponent's revision became transformed and, within that transformation, stronger. It no longer says smooth agreement is probably borrowed and rough agreement is probably independent. It says provenance gates evidential use, strain must be coded by layer, English smoothing must be separated from source-language similarity, and only one modest warning remains: source-language lexical and logical smoothness under possible contact counts against independent-witness confidence. That is a better research instrument and a better public teaching. The remaining risk is that the model still may sound cleaner than the evidence allows, especially if source-language smoothness is hard to code without importing modern categories. The human revision is also improved: it no longer tells lonely synthesizers that their private synthesis is false. It tells them not to make borrowed agreement do the work of community or certainty, which is a narrower and more ethical claim.
claim_units: The revision is transformed, not just stronger: the original contradiction became a provenance-first, layer-resolved diagnostic model.
The strongest surviving rule is procedural: low strain cannot raise independent-witness confidence until provenance and translation mediation are coded.
The one-sided residue is plausible but still empirical-adjacent: source-language smoothness under possible contact may lower independent-convergence confidence, but only modestly.
The named crux is close to the real crux, but it needs one more layer: whether source-language smoothness can be measured without importing the comparer's categories.
The modern human-condition value improved because the teaching now refuses to shame synthetic belonging and names crisis, grief, and destabilizing loneliness as non-fit cases.
A cohort mismatch remains: the practice fits reflective, source-curious seekers better than isolated people whose real need is community, care, and durable belonging.
concessions: The rebuttal fully fixes the overbroad roughness claim: roughness no longer earns independence credit.
The revised teaching is more humane because it targets false evidential comfort without calling the seeker's need for belonging false.
The test proposed by the proponent is concrete enough to pressure the residue rather than merely restating the theory.
turns.counter_model: Keep the four-hypothesis matrix, but add a coding-confidence tier. A pair should receive provenance status, layer-specific strain, and confidence in the coding itself. Low source-language strain under possible contact lowers independent-witness confidence only when the source-language coding is high confidence. If coding confidence is medium or low, the result should remain analogy-weight rather than anti-independence weight.
turns.crux: The real crux is mostly the one named by the proponent: whether genuinely unconnected traditions often converge to low source-language lexical and logical strain without translator smoothing. I would add a prior crux: whether we can code source-language smoothness reliably enough for that test to decide anything.
turns.crux_assessment: The named crux is real but incomplete. It correctly targets the mechanism question, but it underplays the measurement question. If source-language smoothness cannot be coded with high agreement, the mechanism debate will not settle the model.
turns.fairness_check: I accept the revised gate and the withdrawal of the symmetric inversion. I also accept that source-language lexical and logical smoothness under possible contact can be treated as a modest warning signal, provided it is not promoted into proof of borrowing.
turns.hidden_assumption: The revised claim assumes that historians and linguists can reliably distinguish source-language lexical and logical similarity from later comparer-language smoothing. That may hold in well-studied cases with clear philology, but it is weaker for fragmentary traditions, oral traditions, and cases where the scholarly metalanguage supplies the apparent match.
turns.remaining_risk: The remaining human risk is overuse by the wrong cohort. The revision is more useful to real life than the original because it protects seekers from false certainty while preserving curiosity and belonging as legitimate needs. Still, it may become an elegant theory for analytically inclined readers while offering little to people in acute loneliness, grief, depression, or community loss. For those cohorts, the practice should be explicitly secondary to contact, care, ritual participation, or other forms of actual belonging.
sources_cited: Gaudapada, Mandukya Karika, fourth prakarana Alatashanti, on ajativada
Richard King, Early Advaita Vedanta and Buddhism
Michael Comans, The Method of Early Advaita Vedanta
Oliver Freiberger, Elements of a Comparative Methodology in the Study of Religion
turns.steelman: The proponent made the important repair. The claim no longer treats smoothness and roughness as a simple evidential inversion. It now separates provenance, source-language strain, comparer-language smoothing, and layer-specific signatures. That makes the model more defensible and more useful for the intended seeker, because it teaches a narrower honesty rather than attacking synthetic meaning as such.
turns.strongest_objection: The remaining vulnerability is that source-language lexical smoothness is not a neutral fact. Across unrelated languages, what counts as matching vocabulary and argument form may already depend on philological convention, translator choice, or a modern analytic category. If that coding step is unstable, the one-sided residue becomes harder to test: the model may think it has excluded comparer-language smoothing while still relying on it indirectly.
turns.test_that_would_settle_it: Use the proposed blind set, but require an additional inter-rater reliability stage for source-language lexical and logical similarity before testing the residue. The residue survives only if no-contact pairs rarely show high-confidence source-language smoothness, while contact pairs show it more often, and this pattern remains after translator-compression cases are separated.
